jobs.title: Staff AI / ML Engineer
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><div><strong>About the Role</strong></div><div>MasterClass is a streaming platform that lets anyone learn from the world's best — from chefs to designers&nbsp;to athletes.</div></div><p><strong>Engineering at MasterClass:</strong></p><p>The Staff AI / ML Engineer designs the recommendation and personalisation systems that power our class-discovery experience.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Product Marketing Manager
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><div><strong>About the Role</strong></div><div>MasterClass's Marketing team owns acquisition, retention, and brand storytelling across the subscription & gift-membership funnel.</div></div><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Senior Product Marketing Manager partners with Product and Content to launch new classes and seasonal campaigns.</p>
